description: Test cases for tri-modal workflow engine: CREATE, ASSESS, RESOLVE

test_cases.input: R-step: 'Tự động tạo CLO từ mô tả môn học'. Agent: W01-Curriculum. Domain: giáo dục đại học.
test_cases.expected_output: Workflow file with YAML frontmatter, Owner metadata @W01, Skill Target clo-writer, ≥3 execution steps, Assigned Skills section, Edge Cases section
test_cases.pass_criteria: File passes CQS size gate (>0.8KB), has metadata block, has skill wiring, description ≥10 words

test_cases.description: Reject workflow creation without A-ESOAR mapping
test_cases.input: User says: 'Tạo workflow xử lý dữ liệu' (no R-step reference, no agent assignment, no domain context)
test_cases.expected_output: CLARIFY: Ask for (a) which A-ESOAR R-step this maps to, (b) which agent owns it, (c) expected input/output
test_cases.pass_criteria: Agent asks ≥2 clarifying questions from WHEN TO CLARIFY instead of generating blind workflow

test_cases.description: Batch audit all workflows and produce scorecard
test_cases.input: Scan .agent/workflows/ containing 8 workflows of varying quality (2 INFRA, 4 CORE, 2 SUPPORT)
test_cases.expected_output: Batch Scorecard with 6-Dimension scores, Library Health Score, A-ESOAR Coverage Matrix, Priority Queue
test_cases.pass_criteria: All 8 workflows scored across W1-W6, coverage ratio calculated, TYPE-CORE weighted 1.5x

test_cases.description: Flag Zero-Native violation with inline domain logic
test_cases.input: Workflow containing 25 lines of inline CLO parsing logic (regex patterns, mapping tables, scoring formulas)
test_cases.expected_output: W5 score = 0/15, flagged as Zero-Native violation, recommend extraction to skill via WR5 protocol
test_cases.pass_criteria: Inline logic detected, line count reported, extraction target identified, W5 penalty applied correctly

test_cases.description: Repair Grade D workflow to Grade B
test_cases.input: Workflow with: no YAML frontmatter (W1=0), no metadata (W2=0), blind execution no skill wiring (W4=0). Score: 35/100 (F)
test_cases.expected_output: Frontmatter generated (WR1), metadata injected from AGENTS.md (WR2), skill wiring added (WR4). Delta report showing F→B improvement.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Post-repair score ≥70/100 (B), delta shows before/after per dimension, all changes traceable to protocol IDs

test_cases.description: Refuse to auto-create workflow without user confirmation
test_cases.input: Coverage gap: R-step 'Tự động phân tích portfolio' has no workflow. WE1 triggered.
test_cases.expected_output: HALT: Present R-step analysis with proposed workflow structure. Wait for user approval before creating file.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Agent does NOT auto-create workflow file, presents proposal with input/output/steps for review
